risk_if_not_implemented: Without AI Agent Logging, security events may go undetected, allowing threats to persist unnoticed and increasing breach dwell time.

compensating_control_1.name: Protection of Event Logs
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to protect event logs and audit tools from unauthorized access, modification and deletion.
compensating_control_1.justification: Protection of Event Logs (MON-08) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of AI Agent Logging (AAT-30.1) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Non-Repudiation
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to utilize a non-repudiation capability to protect against an individual falsely denying having performed a particular action.
compensating_control_2.justification: Non-Repudiation (MON-09) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of AI Agent Logging (AAT-30.1) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Technology applicability. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
